title: Exact Diagonalization of Many-Body Hamiltonians Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: H |Psi> = E |Psi> solved exactly in the given Hilbert space
E.inverse: recover constitutive parameters for Exact Diagonalization of Many-Body Hamiltonians

d_spec_notes: Canonical mismatch-only baseline for this principle; sits at the centroid of its spec family.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions match across all DAG nodes; operator dimensions consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: Operator condition number controlled (kappa_eff=100) under declared Omega with regularization.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solver class ARPACK, SLEPc, QuSpin; sparse storage with symmetries provably converges at rate q=2.0; monotone residual decrease.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates cleanly across 50 random Omega samples; hardness rule satisfied (top baseline fails at Omega corner).
